name: Little Corner Restaurant Cake - Dolce Del Cantoncino
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and whipping cream until light and fluffy.
3. Add the chopped semisweet chocolate and rum to the mixture; stir until combined.
4. Gently fold in the chopped walnuts and blanched almonds.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish, spreading it evenly.
6. Place the dish in the oven and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
